Meet Scott

A local who takes
pride in every job.

Based in Mornington, I've spent over 20 years caring for gardens and lawns across the Peninsula. When you book LawnCraft, you get me — not a subcontractor. I show up, I do the work, and I make sure it's done right.

I'm passionate about the outdoors and genuinely care about your property. Whether it's a routine mow or a full garden transformation, I bring the same attention to detail to every single job.

Owner Operated 20+ Years Experience Mornington Based

What we do

Everything your garden
needs to thrive.

From weekly lawn maintenance to full garden transformations — LawnCraft does it all, with the care and quality your home deserves.

Core Service
🌿
Lawn Mowing

Regular or one-off mowing at the perfect height for your grass type. Consistent, tidy results — no scalping, no missed strips.

Core Service
✂️
Hedge Trimming

Neat, shaped hedges and shrubs that frame your property. Precise cutting that promotes healthy growth and great kerb appeal.

Core Service
〰️
Lawn Edging

Crisp borders along paths, driveways and garden beds. The finishing touch that transforms a good lawn into a great one.

Core Service
💧
Weed Spraying

Targeted weed control to keep lawns and garden beds clean and healthy. Safe, effective treatments that protect your grass and plants.

🌳
Tree Trimming

Careful shaping and trimming to improve the health, safety and appearance of your trees — preserving their natural form.

🍂
Garden Clean-ups

Seasonal or one-off clean-ups to tackle overgrown spaces, dead growth and debris — restoring order to any outdoor area.

🪵
Mulching

Quality mulching to protect your soil, suppress weeds and retain moisture — keeping garden beds healthy through every season.

🌸
Garden Bed Maintenance

Weeding, pruning, replanting and refreshing garden beds so they stay colourful, tidy and looking their best all year.

🥦
Vegetable Garden Creation

Raised beds or in-ground plots — Scott designs and builds productive veggie gardens tailored to your space and what you love to grow.

"A well-kept garden doesn't happen by accident — it's the result of consistent, caring work." — Scott, LawnCraft & Garden Maintenance
Professional results, every time

Why LawnCraft

The difference is
in the detail.

  • ✓
    Owner on every job Scott attends every single visit personally — no subcontractors, no strangers at your door.
  • ✓
    Reliable & punctual We show up when we say we will, every time. Your schedule matters to us.
  • ✓

  • ✓
    Honest, upfront pricing No hidden fees, no surprises. Just a fair quote and quality work, every time.
